text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I really am just cursed with the worst timing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I finally discovered a great runner to scout at the latest round of
tryout races, but before I had a chance to even call out to her, she
had made a contract with another trainer.
Wow, now that was a huge sigh.

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Haha! My bad, my bad! Did I scare ya? I was just catchin' some Z's
over there in the shade, so I couldn't help but notice.

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And it's so over, you say? Wanna chat about the impending calamity?
I bet just talkin' about it will take a load off.
choice_data_list:
No, I couldn't burden a student with something
like this...

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh I see, I see, that so? Guess you're having trouble on the job, then.
Or maybe you peeped some kinda deep dark secret that the
academy's trying to hide?!
choice_data_list: Uh... It's the trouble on the job thing.

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Okay, yeah, makes sense. Bein' a trainer does seem pretty
tough. Do you have a trainee you're looking out for at the moment?
choice_data_list: W-well, there was someone I was interested in...

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Oh? So you missed your shot at a protégé, then. What else is buggin'
ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Little by little, she gets to the core of my struggle. I have to admit
that I can feel the weight lifting from my shoulders with each passing
question.

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
So now that you've relaxed a bit, why not check out the next round of
tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'll be lookin' for ya, then! Cuz get this—I'm gonna be running
in it!

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And not just that—it's gonna be my very first time! Piques your
interest, yeah? Or not! Listen to me try to give a sales pitch! Come on
out if you feel like it, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tells me all of this with a playful smile. I can't help but feel a little
intrigued.
choice_data_list: Sorry, I didn't get your name.
Sorry, I didn't get your name.

text_block_list.name: Cheery Umamusume
text_block_list.text: What, you wanna know? The name's—

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I bet everyone's got their eyes on Mejiro Ryan today! She looks to be
in great form, too. I'm expecting great things!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and that girl next to her is also a Mejiro, right? Mejiro...
something or other... She's looking kind of slack in comparison.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Umamusume I met on the rooftop that day is a member of the
prestigious Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family is quite renowned for fostering Umamusume of
outstanding repute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among the current generation are talented runners like Mejiro Ryan
and Mejiro McQueen. They've created quite the buzz ever since
joining the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, you came! Looking forward to hearing some cheers, 'specially
since I'll be running my butt off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't think I'll be getting nearly as much attention as Ryan, though.
Haha, couldn't even begin to match her, really.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But yeah, just you watch. I'm a Mejiro too, after all. I'm gonna show
everyone today that I'm worthy of bearing the name.
choice_data_list: S-sure. I'll be cheering for you!
S-sure. I'll be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She remains just as upbeat as she was earlier, but I can sense the
tiniest bit of unease in her expression. With that, she takes her place
at the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer runs in the lead. At a glance, it does look as if she's
adopted a model winning strategy.
choice_data_list: (So this is the form of a Mejiro lady, huh?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But as the race nears its end...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Now! Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's steadily passed by many runners making their final spurts for the
finish. I can see the struggle in her expression as that wonderful form
begins to fall apart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's almost like she's running too by the book, and playing it safe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Ahhh, you're kidding! Last place?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What're they gonna think of me? That wasn't Mejiro-like at all!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
I knew you'd easily take first! The Mejiro name really means
something, huh? Do you mind if I had a word?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer B
text_block_list.text:
Yep, you're a Mejiro through and through! We could use someone as
strong as you on our team!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, uh... I'll get to you all, but can we talk over there? We'll clog
up the stands otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Heh... Haha! Why was I so worried about living up to the Mejiro name? It's not like anyone was even calling my name!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I got way too worked up about all this. How am I gonna
disappoint anyone if they aren't even acknowledging me to start?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Honestly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh... Haha! Hey hey! Enjoy the race? End up spotting anyone
you're interested in? I bet Ryan's at the top of your list, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry about it, I get it. The Mejiro family is brimming with so
much other talent, it's only natural that someone like me isn't on
everyone's radar.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like I'm giving up or anything, ya know? If I don't have
what it takes to stand out now, then I've got no choice but to kick it
into even higher gear. No time to get all emo and stuff!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Gonna get back to training right after this, actually. I'll start back at
the basics and build more stamina, and—
choice_data_list: Is that really what you need to be doing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What I witnessed during that race was surely a sense of pressure.
Pressure to run "like a Mejiro."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a result, her running felt stiff. It's fine to run while staying true to
the basics, but... In truth, that doesn't suit everyone.
choice_data_list: I bet there's a running style more suited to you.
I bet there's a running style more suited to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hm? A style more suited to me? What does...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: ...Oh uh, thanks! I'll have to think about that then.
